title: Tokyo Game Show 2026
desc: Japan's biggest games expo (30th anniversary — a record 5 days). A frequent venue for anime-adaptation and anime tie-in reveals. Officially confirmed Sept 17–21, 2026.

title: AnimeJapan 2027
desc: One of the world's largest anime events — studios announce new series, seasons, trailers and release dates. Moves from Tokyo to Intex Osaka for 2027 (Tokyo Big Sight renovations).

title: Jump Festa 2027
desc: Shueisha's huge annual Shonen Jump event (held each December for the next year) — a major source of Jump anime adaptation announcements. Exact 2027 dates are not yet officially confirmed; shown here for its usual mid/late-December slot — verify on the official site.
